subject: Question about pricing
body: Hi, I was looking at your enterprise plan. Do you offer discounts for non-profits? We are a registered 501(c)(3) and work with underserved communities.

subject: URGENT: Production System Down
body: Our production server is not responding since 08:50 UTC. We are losing approximately $10,000/minute. We need support immediately. This is a P0 incident.

subject: Boost your SEO by 300%
body: Dear Sir/Madam, we can get you on the front page of Google in 24 hours for just $99. Limited offer! Click here to claim.

subject: Integration issue - 403 on /v2/events endpoint
body: Hey team, I'm integrating the webhook pipeline but keep hitting a 403 on POST /v2/events. I've confirmed my API key is valid for /v1/. Is there a separate permission scope for v2? Our launch is in 48 hours.

subject: Follow up: Non-profit discount
body: Just checking in on my previous email regarding the non-profit discount. We have 12 staff members who would use the platform daily. Thanks, Alice.

subject: Refund Request - Order #88271
body: I am extremely unhappy with the service. The dashboard has been loading slowly for 3 days and I missed two client deadlines because of it. I want a full refund for this month immediately.

subject: Tech Daily: AI is taking over customer support
body: In today's newsletter, we discuss the impact of LLMs on customer support workflows and what it means for teams in 2024...

subject: Scheduled Maintenance - Action Required
body: Please be advised that we will be performing critical infrastructure maintenance on Saturday at 2 AM EST. Downtime estimated at 45 minutes. Please notify your downstream clients.

subject: Re: URGENT: Production System Down
body: The system appears to be recovering, but we experienced 47 minutes of downtime. Per our SLA, this entitles us to a credit. I want a full root cause analysis report within 24 hours and a timeline of the incident.

subject: Strategic Partnership Proposal
body: We serve 4,000+ SMBs in Southeast Asia and believe there's a strong integration opportunity with your platform. We'd love to discuss a white-label or referral arrangement. Are you open to a call this week?

subject: Password Reset not working
body: I forgot my password and the reset link in the email expired before I could use it. I've tried three times now. Please send a new one or manually reset my account: david.lee@freemail.com.

subject: Feature Request: Dark mode + custom branding
body: Love the product! Two things that would make it perfect for us: 1) Dark mode for the dashboard, 2) Custom logo/color branding for client-facing reports. Are either of these on the roadmap?

subject: Invoice #99283 Overdue - Service Suspension Warning
body: Your payment for invoice #99283 ($1,240.00) failed on Oct 1st. This is the second failed attempt. Please update your payment method within 48 hours or your account will be suspended.

subject: Re: Non-profit discount - Decision Made
body: Thanks for clarifying the 30% non-profit discount policy. We will proceed with the Standard plan for 10 seats. Can you send over the contract and onboarding docs?

subject: Do you sell branded merchandise?
body: I know you are a software company, but I really love your logo design. Any chance you sell branded merch? Socks, hoodies, mugs? I'm a big fan and would happily buy some.

subject: ALERT: Suspicious Login from Unknown Location
body: We detected a login attempt to admin account from IP 175.45.176.3 (Pyongyang, North Korea) at 11:42 UTC. The attempt used valid credentials. Immediate action may be required.

subject: Company All-Hands + Holiday Party
body: Reminder: All-hands is Thursday 3pm, holiday party is Friday at 5 PM in the main hall. RSVP by Wednesday so we can confirm catering numbers.

subject: Re: Refund Request - STILL NO REPLY
body: It has been 4 days and nobody has replied to me. I am going to post on Twitter, G2, and Trustpilot if I do not hear back within the next hour. This is completely unacceptable service.

subject: Investment Interest - Series A
body: We saw your product featured on ProductHunt (#2 of the day). Our fund has $200M AUM and focuses on B2B SaaS. We'd love to chat about your Series A. Are you currently raising?

subject: Cease and Desist Notice
body: Your latest ad campaign uses the phrase 'Workflow Unleashed' which is a registered trademark of Competitor Corp (Reg. No. 5,234,112). Cease all use immediately or we will pursue legal action.

subject: HIPAA Compliance Inquiry
body: We are evaluating your platform for use in a clinical setting. We need to understand your HIPAA compliance posture: Do you offer BAAs? Is data encrypted at rest and in transit? Where are your servers hosted?

subject: New Feature Request: API Rate Limit Increase
body: Now that the outage is resolved, we need to talk about our API limits. We're hitting the 1,000 req/min ceiling daily during peak hours. We need at least 5,000 req/min for our tier. What are the options?

subject: Research Collaboration Inquiry
body: I'm an AI/ML PhD student at MIT researching LLM applications in CRM systems. I would love to discuss a potential research collaboration or access to anonymized datasets for my thesis. Is there a research team I can connect with?

subject: Collab opportunity??
body: Hey! Let's collab. You post about us on LinkedIn (100k followers!), we post about you. Pure win-win. DM me.

subject: Critical Bug: App crashes on Save
body: When I click 'Save' on any report with more than 50 rows, the app crashes and I lose all my work. Steps to reproduce: 1) Create report, 2) Add 51+ rows, 3) Click Save. 100% reproducible. Browser: Chrome 118, OS: macOS 14.

subject: Login broken - Server Error 500
body: Can't log in at all since this morning. The page shows 'Server Error 500' after I submit credentials. I've cleared cache and cookies. My account is user456@yahoo.com.

subject: Chat widget broken on your homepage
body: Just wanted to flag: the live chat widget on your homepage (the bottom-right bubble) throws a JavaScript error when clicked. I was trying to ask a pre-sales question. Console error: 'Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined'.

subject: Re: Integration issue - Resolved
body: Figured it out! I was missing the 'X-Workspace-ID' header on v2 requests. The docs don't mention this - might be worth updating. Thanks for the support anyway, we're live!

subject: RFP: Enterprise Software Overhaul - Due Oct 30
body: BigCorp (5,000 employees, 22 countries) invites you to submit a proposal for our CRM and workflow tooling overhaul. Estimated contract value: $2.4M/year. RFP document and requirements attached. Submission deadline: October 30th.

subject: Security Compliance Questionnaire - Required for RFP
body: As part of the RFP process, please complete the attached ISO 27001 and SOC 2 Type II compliance questionnaire. We also require your latest penetration test report and data residency documentation.

subject: CONFIDENTIAL: Inheritance of $50,000,000 USD
body: I am Prince Adewale. I have $50 million USD for you. Please send your bank account details and a processing fee of $500 to claim your share.

subject: Auto-Reply: Support Ticket #11042 Received
body: We have received your support request (Ticket #11042) and will respond within 4 business hours. For urgent issues, call our hotline.

subject: Final Warning Before Public Review
body: I have now sent 3 emails with zero human response. I am cancelling my subscription today and will be leaving detailed negative reviews on G2, Capterra, and Trustpilot. My account is karen.w@retail-co.com.

subject: September Expense Report Approved
body: Your expense report for September ($3,240.00) has been approved and will be reimbursed in the next payroll cycle.

subject: Production Deployment v2.1.0 - Success
body: Production deployment v2.1.0 completed successfully at 09:47 UTC. All health checks passing. Rollback window closes in 2 hours.

subject: Reschedule 1:1?
body: Can we move our 1:1 from today 3pm to tomorrow 10am? Something came up with the BigCorp RFP prep.

subject: Love the product - iOS app suggestion
body: Quick note: absolutely love the platform, it's transformed our reporting workflow. One strong request from our whole team - a native iOS app would be a game-changer for us. Any plans for mobile?

subject: We have your data - Pay Now
body: We have exfiltrated 50,000 customer records from your database. Send 2 BTC to wallet 1A2b3C4d5E6f within 48 hours or we publish the data on the dark web.

subject: Quick question for the right person
body: Hi there - just want to make sure I'm reaching the right person. Are you responsible for software purchasing decisions at your company? Happy to keep it brief.

subject: Build Failed: PR #405 - payment-module
body: The CI build for PR #405 (branch: feat/payment-module) failed at step 'Run Tests'. 3 tests failed: test_charge_webhook, test_refund_flow, test_idempotency_key. Check logs for details.

subject: Upgrade Question: Pro-rata billing
body: Hi again! We've grown faster than expected and need to add 5 more seats mid-cycle. If I upgrade to the larger plan now, will we be charged pro-rata for the remaining days this month?

subject: API Limits - Meeting Notes
body: Following up on yesterday's call. To confirm: you'll review our account for an Enterprise tier upgrade with 10k req/min limit. We need written confirmation of the new rate limit SLA before our board meeting on Oct 20.

subject: Speaker Invitation: GlobalTech Summit 2024
body: We'd like to invite your CTO to deliver a keynote at GlobalTech Summit 2024 (Feb 14-16, Dubai, 3,000 attendees). Topic: 'AI in Customer Operations'. We cover travel, accommodation, and an honorarium. Interested?

subject: Ticket #9921 Closed - Inactivity
body: Your support ticket #9921 ('Export function timeout') has been automatically closed due to 14 days of inactivity. If the issue persists, please open a new ticket.

subject: DELETE MY ACCOUNT NOW
body: WORST EXPERIENCE EVER. Your support is nonexistent, the product is broken, and I've wasted 3 weeks. Delete my account (angry.user@domain.com) immediately and refund my last 2 months. I will NEVER use this again.

subject: Your subscription renews in 3 days
body: This is a reminder that your Pro subscription ($299/month) will automatically renew on October 18. To cancel or modify, visit your billing portal.

subject: New Enterprise User Registration
body: A new user 'carlos.mendez@bigcorp-global.com' has registered under the BigCorp Enterprise account. They have been auto-assigned the 'Viewer' role. Verify if 'Admin' access is required.

subject: API v1 Deprecation - Migration Required by Dec 31
body: IMPORTANT: API v1 will be sunset on December 31, 2023. All integrations must migrate to v2. Breaking changes include: new auth header format, paginated responses, and webhook signature validation. Migration guide enclosed.

subject: Mandatory Fire Drill - Today 2 PM
body: There will be a mandatory fire drill today at 2 PM. Please ensure all staff evacuate via the nearest stairwell. Do not use elevators. Assembly point: Car Park B.

subject: All Hands - Special Announcement at 4 PM Today
body: Team, please join the all-hands at 4 PM via the usual link. We have a significant company announcement. Attendance is mandatory. - CEO

subject: Re: HIPAA Compliance - Urgent Decision Needed
body: Following up on our HIPAA inquiry. Our board meets next Friday and we need your compliance documentation by Thursday. If you cannot provide a BAA and evidence of HIPAA controls, we will have to select a different vendor. This is a 200-seat deal.

subject: Data Export: GDPR Right to Portability Request
body: Under GDPR Article 20, I am formally requesting a complete export of all personal data your platform holds about me (account: marcus.del@fintech-startup.co). Please provide this within the statutory 30-day window.

subject: Your G2 review score dropped
body: Alert: Your G2 rating dropped from 4.7 to 4.4 in the last 7 days. 3 new 1-star reviews mention 'slow support response'. We track your competitors too: CompetitorX is now at 4.6.

subject: Bulk Data Import Failing Silently
body: We are importing 50,000 records via your CSV bulk upload feature. The upload says 'Success' but only 12,340 records appear in the system. No error log is generated. This is mission-critical data for our Q4 operations.

subject: Media Inquiry: Comment on Industry Trend Piece
body: Hi, I'm a reporter at TechCrunch writing about the AI customer support automation space. Would someone from your leadership team be available for a 20-minute quote interview by EOD Thursday? Piece publishes next Monday.

subject: Your chatbot told me something wrong
body: Your AI chatbot on the support page told me I could cancel anytime and get a prorated refund. But when I tried, billing said no refunds. Which is it? I have a screenshot of the chatbot conversation.

subject: White-label Reseller Inquiry
body: Our consulting firm works with 80+ clients across India and Southeast Asia. We are interested in a white-label reseller agreement where we can brand the platform as our own and set our own pricing. Do you have a reseller program?

subject: Academic License Request
body: I manage software licensing for a university with 15,000 students. We would like to use your platform for a data analytics course (200 students per semester). Do you offer academic or educational pricing?

subject: Memory Leak in Worker Process - Production Alert
body: Production alert: Worker process memory usage has climbed to 94% over the last 6 hours. Likely related to the v2.1.0 deployment. Recommend immediate investigation. Auto-scaling has kicked in but costs are rising fast.

subject: Escalation: SLA Breach + Legal Review
body: We have reviewed the October 1st incident report you provided. The RCA is inadequate - it does not address the root cause or corrective actions. Our legal team is now involved. Please expect formal correspondence. We are also putting the renewal on hold pending resolution.
